adjusted.reasoning: England topped Group L and are heavy favourites (-360) against a DR Congo side that qualified as a best third. Anchor to market; trim the model's 95% only for knockout variance.

posted_to.note: R32 pre-bet sweep (whole round biddable). PROTECT mode (rank 1/34, lead +12, rem_grp=0) but k=0.3 => contest pick == EP-max on adjusted track; ~32 KO matches remain so EP-max is right. Winner-scoreline (KO; platform draw odds 0.00). Anchored to de-vigged market.

adjusted.reasoning: USA won Group D and play at home in Santa Clara; Bosnia qualified as a best third and lean on 40-year-old Dzeko. Market (-280) makes the USA clear but not overwhelming favourites; anchor there, below the model's 92%.

factors.factor: USA -280 / draw +380 / BIH +800; USA home, Bosnia 3rd-place qualifier, Dzeko 40

odds.source: FanDuel 2026-06-27 (USA -280/draw +380/BIH +800); USA home Santa Clara; Dzeko 40

adjusted.reasoning: Belgium are only modest favourites (+105) after an underwhelming group (two draws, five points), and Senegal are a strong third-place side (beat 10-man Iraq 5-0). Tight game, high draw; anchor to market.

factors.factor: Belgium +105 / draw +220 / Senegal +290; Belgium -194 to advance

odds.source: FanDuel 2026-06-28 (BEL +105/draw +220/SEN +290); Belgium modest fav, Senegal strong
